productName: Heavenly Buds - Bubble Hash - Strawberry Bubbles DOH - 1g
description: Solventless sativa bubble hash from Strawberry Bubbles — ice-water washed and sifted through micron mesh bags to collect pristine, trichome-rich resin heads, no chemicals at all. Clean, washed, and potent, with notes of strawberry, berry, and mango, delivering an active, daytime spark.
